rulings.Case Title: IN RE: GOODRICH & PENNINGTON MORTGAGE FUND, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Determine That Goodrich & Pennington Must Post Bond To Stay Execution On Judgment Pending Appeal
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 23, 2006. RESPONDENT ADVANTA MORTGAGE CORP. USA AND ADVANTA MORTGAGE CONDUIT SERVICES,INC.'S Motion To Determine That Goodrich AND Pennington Must Post Bond To Stay Execution On Judgment Pending Appeal IS GRANTED. 1.) ARBITRAITON PROCEEDINGS NOT SUBJECT TO SAME STATUTORY PROTECTIONS AS THOSE WHO PARTICIPATE IN A TRIAL. SEE VANDENBURG. THE ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPERT FEES AWARDED IN THE ARIBTRATION FEES AWARDED IN THE ARBITRATION NOT "ROUTINE" COSTS COVERED BY CCP 917.1d AND ALSO SEE BANK OF SAN PEDRO. 2.) IN OCURT DISCRETION PROPER TO REQUIRED POSTING HERE. =(302/REQ/PB)

PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER CONFIRMING THE NEW HEARING DATE. =(302/REQ/302)
